summary: Iteration 2 full regression: all 22 backend pytest cases pass (12 existing + 10 new auth cases). Frontend verified end-to-end for iteration 2 deliverables — no city ribbon above navbar, logo visible, Instagram links to https://www.instagram.com/vanshajhanda?igsh=MXJ0amZneXVnaHRhcw==, footer shows +91 72176 12408 and @vanshajhanda, Login dropdown has all 4 items (client login, vendor login, create client, list your business), full register→dashboard→logout→login flow works for client, wrong-role login correctly blocked with 403 'This account is not a vendor account', /dashboard protected (redirects to /login/client), 41 vendor cards render, coral/blush palette applied (white navbar, soft pink bg, no deep maroon). Seeded admin (admin@shaadisaga.in/Admin@123) correctly rejected when logging in as client/vendor (403).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py startup: `seed_admin` correctly updates existing admin password if env password changed (good, matches playbook).
JWT_SECRET is hardcoded as a default fallback value in .env — acceptable for preview but must be rotated for production.
CORS allow_origins uses single FRONTEND_URL with allow_credentials=True — correct for cookie auth. Localhost dev will fail unless FRONTEND_URL is overridden.
No brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (playbook suggests 5-attempt lockout). Not critical for MVP but should be added before production.
set_auth_cookie uses samesite='none' + secure=True — correct for cross-site preview hosting. Would need to change for localhost http dev.
POST /api/seed is still public (flagged in iteration 1) — should be admin-only or removed before production.
Cookie max_age=7*24*3600 matches JWT 7-day expiry — good.

/api/auth/register does NOT check role-based business_name requirement (a vendor can register without business_name since it's Optional). Consider adding validation: if role=='vendor' then business_name required.
Frontend AuthProvider calls /api/auth/me on every page mount — 401 noise in console for anonymous users is expected but visually noisy; consider suppressing or gating on route.
test_credentials: admin@shaadisaga.in / Admin@123 (role=admin, seeded); client@test.com / Test@123 (role=client, pre-existing); vendor@test.com / Test@123 (role=vendor, pre-existing). Tests also create random TEST_client_*@example.com and TEST_vendor_*@example.com via /api/auth/register — these remain in DB (no cleanup endpoint, minimal footprint).
seed_data_creation: No new seed data required. Backend auto-seeds 41 vendors, 4 real weddings, 19 categories, and admin user on startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py has 22 tests in classes: TestCategories, TestVendors, TestRealWeddings, TestMatchmaker (Claude Sonnet 4.5, ~20s total), TestAuth (10 cases: register client+vendor, duplicate email, wrong role 403, wrong password 401, login success + /me, /me without cookie 401, logout clears cookie, admin cannot login as client, bcrypt verify). Auth uses httpOnly cookie 'access_token' with samesite=none+secure. Frontend data-testids for auth: nav-login, nav-login-dropdown, nav-login-client, nav-login-vendor, nav-register-client, nav-register-vendor, nav-user-menu, nav-user-dropdown, nav-logout, nav-instagram, footer-phone, footer-instagram, login-form-{role}, login-email, login-password, login-submit, login-error, register-form-{role}, register-name, register-email, register-phone, register-password, register-business, register-submit, register-error, dashboard-page.
rca of the issue: No bugs identified. All iteration 2 requirements (city ribbon removed, phone updated to 7217612408, Instagram connected, JWT role-based auth, coral/blush aesthetic) are correctly implemented and working end-to-end.
